2605.08043.title: SCOPE: Structured Decomposition and Conditional Skill Orchestration for Complex Image Generation
2605.08043.paper_summary: While text-to-image models have made strong progress in visual fidelity, faithfully realizing complex visual intents remains challenging because many requirements must be tracked across grounding, generation, and verification. We refer to these requirements as semantic commitments and formalize their lifecycle discontinuity as the Conceptual Rift, where commitments may be locally resolved or checked but fail to remain identifiable as the same operational units throughout the generation lifecycle. To address this, we propose SCOPE, a specification-guided skill orchestration framework that maintains semantic commitments in an evolving structured specification and conditionally invokes retrieval, reasoning, and repair skills around unresolved or violated commitments. To evaluate commitment-level intent realization, we introduce Gen-Arena, a human-annotated benchmark with entity- and constraint-level specifications, together with Entity-Gated Intent Pass Rate (EGIP), a strict entity-first pass criterion. SCOPE substantially outperforms all evaluated baselines on Gen-Arena, achieving 0.60 EGIP, and further achieves strong results on WISE-V (0.907) and MindBench (0.61), demonstrating the effectiveness of persistent commitment tracking for complex image generation.
2605.08043.paper_summary_zh: 雖然文本到圖像模型在視覺真實性方面取得了顯著進展，但忠實實現複雜的視覺意圖仍然具有挑戰性，因為需要在基礎、生成和驗證過程中跟蹤許多要求。我們將這些要求稱為語義承諾，並將其生命周期的不連續性形式化為概念裂縫，在這裡承諾可能在局部得到解決或檢查，但在整個生成生命周期中無法保持可識別為相同的操作單元。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了SCOPE，一個以規範為指導的技能協調框架，該框架在不斷演變的結構化規範中維護語義承諾，並有條件地調用檢索、推理和修復技能來處理未解決或違反的承諾。為了評估承諾級別的意圖實現，我們引入了Gen-Arena，一個具有實體和約束級別規範的人類標註基準，以及實體優先通過率（EGIP），這是一個嚴格的實體優先通過標準。SCOPE在Gen-Arena上顯著超越了所有評估的基準，達到0.60的EGIP，並在WISE-V（0.907）和MindBench（0.61）上進一步取得了優異的結果，展示了持續承諾跟蹤在複雜圖像生成中的有效性。
2605.08043.author: Tianfei Ren et.al.
2605.08043.authors: Tianfei Ren, Zhipeng Yan, Yiming Zhao, Zhen Fang, Yu Zeng, Guohui Zhang, Hang Xu, Xiaoxiao Ma, Shiting Huang, Ke Xu, Wenxuan Huang, Lionel Z. Wang, Lin Chen, Zehui Chen, Jie Huang, Feng Zhao
